title: Smoked Duck Carpaccio
description: A refreshing and savory appetizer featuring thinly sliced smoked duck, served with a tangy Tunisian vinaigrette.
instructions: 1. In a large bowl, combine the sliced smoked duck and chopped parsley.
2. Drizzle the intense olive oil over the duck and toss to coat.
3. Sprinkle the crushed black pepper over the duck and toss again.
4. In a small bowl, whisk together the Tunisian vinaigrette and a pinch of salt.
5. Pour the vinaigrette over the duck and toss to coat.
6. Arrange the carpaccio-style arugula on a serving platter or individual plates.
7. Top the arugula with the smoked duck mixture.
8. Serve immediately, with lemon wedges on the side.
